completedorder.description: This table records financial transactions, detailing each order by its ID, the account initiating the transaction, the destination bank and account, the amount transferred, and the purpose of the transaction (e.g., Household Payment, Loan Payment).

CRM Events.description: This table records consumer complaints related to financial products and services, detailing the date received, product and sub-product categories, specific issues and sub-issues, consumer narratives (if any), submission and resolution methods, company responses, timeliness of these responses, dispute status, and unique complaint and client IDs.

completeddisposition.description: This table records the relationships between display IDs, client IDs, and account IDs, specifying whether a client is an owner or a user of the associated account.

completedcard.description: This table records the issuance of VISA Signature cards, including card ID, associated display ID, card type, and the full date of issuance (year, month, day, and a combined fulldate format).

LuxuryLoanPortfolio.description: This table contains detailed information on loans, including loan ID, funded amount, funding date, loan duration, interest rates, payment details, borrower's personal information (name, social security number, phone number, employment), property details (value, purpose, address, city, state, zip code, building class, tax class), and property size metrics (total units, land square feet, gross square feet). The loans are primarily for properties located in New York City and seem to be for the purpose of purchasing boats.

CRM Call Center Logs.description: This table records customer service call details, including the date received, complaint ID, client information, phone number, call line, call ID, priority, type, outcome, server name, service start and exit times, and total service time.

completedloan.description: This table lists loan transactions, including loan ID, account ID, loan amount, duration, monthly payments, status, date of the loan (year, month, day, and full date), location, and purpose of the loan. All loans in the preview are for purchasing cars.

completeddistrict.description: This table lists districts, including their IDs, city names, state names, state abbreviations, regions, and divisions within the United States.

completedtrans.description: This table records credit transactions made in cash, detailing transaction IDs, account IDs, amounts, balances, and the exact date and time of each transaction in 2013. Each row represents a unique credit transaction with associated details such as the type of operation and the date components (year, month, day) along with the full date and time.

CRM Reviews.description: This table contains customer reviews for Eagle National Mortgage, including the date of the review, the star rating given (out of 5), the content of the review, the product mentioned, and the district ID associated with the review.

completedacct.description: This table records monthly account issuances, detailing the account ID, district ID, issuance frequency, and the exact date of issuance broken down by year, month, and day, starting from January 1, 2013.

completedclient.description: This table contains detailed personal information for clients, including their ID, sex, full date of birth (with separate columns for day, month, and year), age, social security number, full name (first, middle, last), phone number, email, address (with separate columns for address line 1, address line 2, city, state, and zipcode), and district ID.
